Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Navigator’s Guild]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Cheska Bennett is the Head of the Navigator’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — The Guild of Navigators is a guild.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Navigator's Guild crest is a ship’s wheel with a single eye in the center.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Calder Marten has a job for the Navigator's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — The Navigator’s Guild supervises Andel Petronus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Navigator's Guild is a group that can be loaded with soldiers and Guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Calder Marten was sentenced to forced labor in the service of the Navigator’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — The Guild of Navigators is a guild that includes Captains and members who receive discounts at alchemical chapter houses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — The Navigator’s Guild is one of the groups on the Gray Island.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Calder Marten is a Captain in the Navigator's Guild.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — The Navigator's Guild sent Calder on orders to search for Captain Tommison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — The Navigator’s Guild employs Readers.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
